---
title: "Task contract"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tinytest)
library(rho.async)
```

```{r immediate-task}
t <- rho_task(42)
expect_false(rho_pending(t))
expect_equal(rho_await(t), 42)
```

```{r rejected-task}
t <- rho_rejected("boom")
expect_error(rho_await(t), "boom")
```

```{r then-chain}
t <- rho_task(2)
out <- rho_then(t, function(x) x + 3)
expect_equal(rho_await(out), 5)
```
